meaning: n.火葬场的火化工,焚尸人,焚尸炉
examples: This Cremator USES shifting body transference system, good looking and perfectly safe.
Lying before the cremator in the crematorium, the coffin just resembles a huge and heavy drawer. It slides slowly through into the cremator.
This paper discusses the fundamentals and characteristics of catalytic combustion and the type of catalyst and approaches the way to apply the technology of catalytic combustion in cremator.
